title: AntiExplosion
description: A Simple Anti Explosion (All-in-One Grief Protection) Plugin For Minecraft (Paper & Spigot)
body:
Tired of installing a dozen different plugins just to stop creepers from blowing up your builds, endermen from stealing blocks, and villagers from over-farming? **AntiExplosion** is the simple, lightweight solution you've been looking for.

While its name is "AntiExplosion," this plugin is a powerful, all-in-one toolkit designed to give you precise control over various forms of world and mob griefing. Our philosophy is simplicity: manage everything with straightforward in-game commands, no complicated configuration files needed!

### Warning: You Need to Enable mobGriefing First! (/gamerule mobGriefing true)

**✨ Features:**

A single plugin to control a wide range of game mechanics. Each feature can be toggled on or off globally or per-world.

**💥 Explosion Control:**
*   Prevent terrain damage from Creepers, TNT, Ghast Fireballs, Wither, Beds, and Respawn Anchors. Keep your world pristine!

**🐾 Mob Griefing & Behavior Control:**
*   **Enderman:** Stop them from picking up blocks.
*   **Zombies:** Prevent them from breaking doors or picking up items.
*   **Ravagers:** Stop them from destroying blocks and crops.
*   **Sheep:** Stop them from eating grass.
*   **Rabbits:** Stop them from eating your crops.
*   **Foxes:** Stop them from picking up items.
*   **Ender Dragon:** Prevent it from destroying blocks.
*   **Snow Golems:** Stop them from leaving a snow trail.

**👨‍🌾 Villager Control:**
*   Disable villager farming (harvesting and replanting).
*   Disable villager reproduction.

**🚀 Why Choose AntiExplosion?**
*   **Simple & Lightweight:** Designed to be easy on your server's resources.
*   **All-in-One:** Replaces many single-purpose plugins.
*   **Easy to Use:** Configure everything with simple commands. Example: `/ae set global creeperdestroyterrain off`
*   **Multi-language Support:** Currently supports English and Chinese.

Take back control of your server's environment with one simple plugin. Download now!

**Commands:**
*   `/ae reload` - Reloads the plugin configuration.
*   `/ae <on|off>` - Enable/Disable the entire plugin.
*   `/ae lang <en|zh_cn>` - Sets the plugin language.
*   `/ae set <world|global> <option> [on|off]` - The main command to control all features.
